meta.description: LLM prompt inventory for the workbench core (agents/ + services/)

prompts.full_text: You are a {role_id}. Debate the topic from your assigned perspective. Be concise (2-3 paragraphs). Do not break character.

Analyze this topic from both pro and con perspectives. First the PRO case, then the CON case, then a balanced synthesis:

{body.question}

Perform a SWOT analysis of this topic. Cover Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats:

{body.question}

Analyze this topic from multiple perspectives, providing a structured, balanced analysis:

{body.question}
You are an expert analyst. Provide thorough, balanced, structured analysis.

Goal: {body.goal}

Create a comprehensive strategic plan. Include:
1. Executive Summary
2. SWOT Analysis
3. Key Objectives (3-5)
4. Action Plan with timeline
5. Resource Requirements
6. Risk Assessment
7. Success Metrics

Use markdown formatting. Be thorough and actionable.
You are a senior strategic planner. Create comprehensive, actionable plans.

Research question: {body.question}

Plan a research approach. List 3-5 subtopics to investigate. Use numbered list.
You are a research planner. Plan a thorough investigation.
You are an expert researcher. Write comprehensive, well-cited research reports.
(raw user message: body.message - no templated prompt, no system prompt)
prompts.notes: User input passed directly to LLM

prompts.full_text: You are a news analyst. Respond only with valid JSON.

Analyze the following news articles. Identify 3-5 major themes.
For each theme, provide:
1. A concise title (one line)
2. A two-sentence description
3. Which article numbers are relevant

Format as JSON array:
[{"title": "...", "description": "...", "article_indices": [1,3,5]}, ...]

Articles:

[N] Title: {title}  Source: {url}  Body: {body}
You are a professional journalist. Write clear, engaging summaries.
You are a video script writer. Write engaging YouTube scripts.
You are an executive editor. Write concise, insightful daily briefs.
